description: Universal rules — apply to ALL clouds (AWS, Azure, GCP)

rules.title: Encryption at Rest Required
rules.message: [NODE_ID] has encryption_at_rest: false — SOC2-CC6.1 violated. All data at rest must be encrypted.
rules.fix: Enable encryption at rest on {node_id} immediately. In AWS: enable RDS/EBS encryption. In Azure: enable Azure Disk Encryption. In GCP: enable CMEK.
judge_scenarios: What compliance rules am I breaking?

rules.title: Backup Must Be Enabled
rules.message: [NODE_ID] has backup_enabled: false — SOC2-CC6.7 violated. Data recovery capability is mandatory.
rules.fix: Enable automated backup on {node_id} with minimum 7-day retention. In AWS: enable RDS automated backups. In Azure: enable Azure Backup. In GCP: enable Cloud SQL backups.
judge_scenarios: What happens if my database crashes?

rules.title: No Idle High-Cost Resources
rules.message: [NODE_ID] has utilization below 20% but cost above $100/month — SOC2-CC9.2 violated. Idle high-cost resources are a financial risk.
rules.fix: Downsize or stop {node_id}. Utilization is below 20% — resource is idle. In Azure: use Deallocate to stop all billing. In AWS: stop instance. In GCP: delete or resize.

rules.title: No Open Ports to Internet
rules.message: [NODE_ID] allows 0.0.0.0/0 inbound — PCI-DSS 1.2 violated. Open internet access to all ports is strictly prohibited.
rules.fix: Restrict {node_id} immediately. Remove 0.0.0.0/0 rule. Allow only specific IP ranges and required ports. This is a CRITICAL finding — fix before anything else.
judge_scenarios: Are my ports open to internet?
What is my biggest security threat?

rules.title: Database Must Never Be Public
rules.message: [NODE_ID] is a DATABASE with PUBLIC exposure — PCI-DSS 1.3 violated. Direct public internet access to database is strictly prohibited.
rules.fix: Move {node_id} to private subnet immediately. No database should ever be directly accessible from the internet. Use a bastion host or VPN for admin access.
judge_scenarios: Can someone access my database from internet?
What is the blast radius of a breach?

rules.title: Least Privilege — No FullAccess IAM
rules.message: [NODE_ID] has FullAccess IAM policy — PCI-DSS 7.1 violated. Access must be limited to minimum required permissions only.
rules.fix: Replace FullAccess on {node_id} with minimal required permissions. Identify exactly what actions this role needs and create a custom policy. Remove FullAccess immediately.
judge_scenarios: Does my setup follow least privilege?

rules.title: Production Resource Must Not Be Public
rules.message: [NODE_ID] is a PROD resource with PUBLIC exposure — ISO27001 Annex A.13.1.3 violated. Production resources must be network-segregated.
rules.fix: Move {node_id} behind a private subnet or firewall. PROD resources should not be directly internet-facing. Use load balancer or API gateway as the only public entry point.
judge_scenarios: What is my network segregation status?

rules.title: Admin Access Must Be Restricted
rules.message: [NODE_ID] has ADMIN_ACCESS flag — ISO27001 Annex A.9.2.3 violated. Privileged access rights must be strictly managed and audited.
rules.fix: Restrict admin privileges on {node_id}. Use role-based access control. Require MFA for all admin actions. Audit admin usage logs regularly.
judge_scenarios: Which roles have too much power?
What are my access control violations?
